content: Roger Miller si arruolò nell'Esercito degli Stati Uniti all'età di diciassette anni. Venne mandato in una base militare vicino ad Atlanta, Georgia.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Roger Miller entered the United States Army at the age of seventeen. He was sent to an army base near Atlanta, Georgia
